article.title: Uber SDE-1 interview prep
article.content:
Can anyone guide me for Uber SDE-1 process?
- I have recived mail for OA

This is first time I'm looking at BPS round, what is expected here and how is it conducted?

There are 3 interviews mentioned after OA and BPS, 
1. DSA
2. LLD
3. HM

What kind of questions asked in these rounds, LLD-What kind of questions asked for freshers/SDE-1 candidates?
HM- What is expected and what kind of questions we can expect?

post.content: Got the same. Looking for inputs!
Any one got update regarding OA result?\n

[@Deekshith Kumar Emmadi](/u/EDeekshith)
most probably Uber focus on Graph and DP Questions with medium to hard difficulty 
coming to LLD they test your design patterns and code quality
Hm basically Behavioural kind questions 


hope this helps
I have also given the OA on 24th feb 2026 what is the selection critera for moving ahead for the next rounds if all the questions of OA was solved with all test cases passed?
same mail! It\'s job fair something going on.
all questions on graphs and dp from what i know\n
Received the same. Will they ask HLD in BPS round
